function.name: request_finance_action_preflight
function.description: Before attempting any finance action, create an ActionRail preflight transaction and return the policy decision, risk, checks, and next allowed action.

action_type.description: The category of financial action to perform, e.g., 'pay_invoice' or 'create_bill'.

invoice_id.description: The alphanumeric identifier of the invoice.

due_date.description: The due date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

contract_id.description: Optional contract ID reference. Required if the amount is above threshold.

evidence_refs.description: Optional list of URLs pointing to evidence docs (e.g., local://uploaded_documents/{id}).

idempotency_key.description: A unique client-generated UUID to prevent duplicate transaction requests.

allowed_next_action.description: The next step allowed in the transaction lifecycle (e.g., 'execute_transaction', 'request_finance_approval').

checks.description: Individual check results generated by the policy engine.
